–Also called ZOBA; ARAM-ZOBAH; HAMATH-ZOBAH
–A kingdom in the north of Palestine1Sa 14:47
–Conquest of, by David2Sa 8:3-8,12;1Ki 11:23,24;1Ch 
18:2-9
–Its inhabitants mercenaries of the Ammonites against David2Sa 10:6-19;1Ch 19:6-19
–David writes a psalm after the conquest of, see the title ofPs 60
–Invaded by Solomon2Ch 8:3
